property.name: Great Pick! Parking, Free Daily Breakfast!

knowledge_category_features.description: Extra pillows and blankets are provided.
Towels, bed sheets, soap, and toilet paper are provided.
55-inch HDTV with HBO Max and premium cable is available in the room.
Paid valet parking is available for 1 space at $12 per day.
Shared fitness center is open 24/7 on the property.
First aid kit is available on site.
Fire extinguisher is available on site.
Pets are welcome with an additional charge of $75.00. Up to 2 dogs or cats allowed, max 35 lbs each.

Nearby attractions include Frost Park (0.3 mi), Cozy Cove Marina (0.4 mi), Gallery of Amazing Things (0.6 mi), IGFA Fishing Hall of Fame Museum (0.8 mi), Harbour Towne Marina (0.9 mi), Sheridan Square Shopping Center (1.3 mi), Tigertail Lake Park (1.5 mi), Museum of Art Fort Lauderdale (4.6 mi), Port Everglades Cruise Terminal (4.9 mi), and Bonnet House Museum and Gardens (6.2 mi).
Uber or Lyft are recommended for getting around. Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood International Airport is 1.5 miles away. Free shuttle service is available upon request.

property_knowledge_categories.description: Free daily breakfast and complimentary toiletries are provided. Cleaning services are included in the nightly price. Please note that a kitchen and washer are not available.

Minimum age required for check-in is 21 years old with a mandatory valid ID. A valid credit or debit card is required for a refundable security deposit. Smoking in the room is strictly prohibited and subject to a penalty fee. Early check-out is charged for all remaining nights. Late check-out until 4 PM is charged a half-day rate, and a full-day rate after 4 PM. Receiving packages/parcels is subject to an additional daily charge.
